Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_WroteSec.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_WroteSecretCodeLockOpened
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_WroteSec.raw_text: {PLAYER}在门上写下\n密码。\p“我想拥抱戏法大王”\n…… …… …… ……\p锁“咔嗒”一声开了！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_WroteSec.display_text:
{PLAYER}在门上写下
密码。

“我想拥抱戏法大王”
…… …… …… ……

锁“咔嗒”一声开了！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaIn.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaIn.raw_text: 戏法大王总是像一阵烟\n似的消失了，他怎么做到的？$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaIn.display_text:
戏法大王总是像一阵烟
似的消失了，他怎么做到的？

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaDe.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaDefeat
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaDe.raw_text: 啊呀！你真是太强了！\n你怎么做到的？$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaDe.display_text:
啊呀！你真是太强了！
你怎么做到的？

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaPo.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaPo.raw_text: 我也想要像一阵烟一样\n消失或者出现。$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaPo.display_text:
我也想要像一阵烟一样
消失或者出现。

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_PatriciaIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia.raw_text: 总是在同样的地方转来转去……\n这会招致厄运的……$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia.display_text:
总是在同样的地方转来转去……
这会招致厄运的……

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_PatriciaPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia.raw_text: 我已经在同一个地方转了\n十多次了……真不幸……$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia.display_text:
我已经在同一个地方转了
十多次了……真不幸……

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisIn.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisIn.raw_text: 胜利的人就会先离开这儿，\n我有这样的预感。$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisIn.display_text:
胜利的人就会先离开这儿，
我有这样的预感。

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisDe.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisDefeat
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisDe.display_text:
哦！
好，那么，你先走吧！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisPo.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisPo.raw_text: 你会解开戏法屋所有的谜题，\n我有这样的预感。$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisPo.display_text:
你会解开戏法屋所有的谜题，
我有这样的预感。

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaI.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaI.raw_text: 哼哼哼哼，终于来了！\n我们这就开始吧！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaI.display_text:
哼哼哼哼，终于来了！
我们这就开始吧！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaP.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaP.raw_text: 哼！我一点也没有遗憾\n一点也不！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaP.display_text:
哼！我一点也没有遗憾
一点也不！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroIn.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroIn.raw_text: 我一直看着你走了过来！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroIn.display_text: 我一直看着你走了过来！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroDe.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroDefeat
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroDe.raw_text: 我没有预见到这样的结果……$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroDe.display_text: 我没有预见到这样的结果……

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroPo.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroPo.raw_text: 啊，不管怎样，\n我们在命运之地相识了。\p虽然对对方来说我们都是怪人，\n我们也都要努力啊！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroPo.display_text:
啊，不管怎样，
我们在命运之地相识了。

虽然对对方来说我们都是怪人，
我们也都要努力啊！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_EverettP.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_EverettPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_EverettP.raw_text: 我本来打算打败你之后\n和你交换位置，结果……$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_EverettP.display_text:
我本来打算打败你之后
和你交换位置，结果……
